prompt_text: Open source or affordable CRM tools instead of HubSpot
response:
# Budget-Friendly CRM Alternatives to HubSpot

## **Free & Open Source**

### **Odoo**
- Fully open-source, self-hosted or cloud
- Comprehensive modules (sales, marketing, accounting, inventory)
- Steep learning curve but highly customizable
- Best for: Technical teams, complex needs

### **ERPNext**
- Open-source, built on Frappe Framework
- Good for small businesses and nonprofits
- Includes CRM + accounting + inventory
- Active community support
- Best for: All-in-one operations

### **Dolibarr**
- Lightweight, easy to set up
- Good for SMBs
- Includes invoicing, projects, inventory
- Best for: Simple, straightforward needs

### **SuiteCRM**
- Fork of SugarCRM
- Feature-rich, open-source
- Self-hosted or cloud
- Best for: HubSpot-like functionality on budget

---

## **Affordable Paid Options**

### **Zoho CRM** (Most Popular Alternative)
- **$15-45/user/month**
- Solid feature set, good automation
- Free plan available (limited)
- Best for: Growing teams on tight budgets

### **Pipedrive**
- **$14-99/user/month**
- Sales-focused, visual pipeline
- Excellent mobile app
- Best for: Sales teams specifically

### **HubSpot Competitor Tools**
- **Freshsales**: $15-99/user/month (good support)
- **Agile CRM**: $9-49/user/month (lean)
- **ActiveCampaign**: $15-229/month (marketing-focused)

### **No-Code/Low-Code**
- **Airtable**: $10-20/month (spreadsheet + CRM hybrid)
- **Monday.com**: $10-24/user/month (highly visual)

---

## **Quick Comparison**

| Tool | Cost | Best For | Learning Curve |
|------|------|----------|-----------------|
| Odoo | Free | Complex ops | High |
| Zoho | $15+ | Growing startups | Medium |
| Pipedrive | $14+ | Sales teams | Low |
| SuiteCRM | Free | Power users | Medium |

**My recommendation**: **Zoho CRM** (affordable + feature-parity) or **Pipedrive** (simplicity + specialization)

What's your primary use case? That would help narrow it down further.
